script_text: Characters' actions shape what happens in the story.
Their traits, feelings, and choices push the plot forward.
Character traits are their personality. Brave, kind, curious, selfish.
We find traits by watching what they do and say.
Nia climbed a tall ladder to save a kitten.
That action tells us she is brave and caring!
What does the character choose to do? Their choices reveal who they are.
Now you are ready to describe characters!
